user.title: Connect to TPG HomeAI
user.description: Enter the URL of your running TPG HomeAI Orchestrator server (the add-on or a standalone Docker instance).

error.cannot_connect: Could not reach the TPG HomeAI server at that URL.
error.invalid_auth: The TPG HomeAI server rejected the API key.

abort.already_configured: This TPG HomeAI server is already configured.

init.title: TPG HomeAI options
init.description: Defaults and behavior for the orchestrator integration.

backend_offline.title: TPG HomeAI backend offline
backend_offline.description: Home Assistant cannot reach the TPG HomeAI Orchestrator backend. Check that the add-on/container is running and the server URL is correct.

config_error.title: TPG HomeAI configuration error
config_error.description: The orchestrator failed to load its YAML configuration and is running in degraded mode. Fix config/*.yaml and reload.

pending_approvals.title: TPG HomeAI devices pending approval
pending_approvals.description: Discovery found new devices awaiting review. Approve or ignore them from the TPG HomeAI device page or services.

reload_config.name: Reload config
reload_config.description: Hot-reload the TPG HomeAI server YAML configuration.

scan_devices.name: Scan devices
scan_devices.description: Run a Home Assistant discovery scan and queue new entities for approval.

approve_discovered_entity.name: Approve discovered entity
approve_discovered_entity.description: Approve a discovered entity and write it into the device config.

ignore_discovered_entity.name: Ignore discovered entity
ignore_discovered_entity.description: Add an entity to the avoid list so the AI never targets it.

map_entity.name: Map entity
map_entity.description: Map a discovered entity as a specific device type.

confirm_action.name: Confirm action
confirm_action.description: Confirm a pending sensitive action using its token.

cancel_confirmation.name: Cancel confirmation
cancel_confirmation.description: Cancel a pending sensitive action without executing it.

get_completion_status.name: Get completion status
get_completion_status.description: Return Jarvis v1 software and deployment completion gates, blockers, and stop criteria.

get_voice_profiles.name: Get voice profiles
get_voice_profiles.description: Return assistant voice profiles and TTS readiness.

get_house_state.name: Get house state
get_house_state.description: Return situational house modes, attention items, rooms, and recommendations.

get_mode_brain.name: Get mode brain
get_mode_brain.description: Return active house modes, reply routing policy, confirmation gates, and source trust policy.

get_assistant_intelligence.name: Get assistant intelligence
get_assistant_intelligence.description: Return assistant personalities, voices, permissions context, and approved memories.

get_tablet_profiles.name: Get tablet profiles
get_tablet_profiles.description: Return display/tablet routing profiles for dashboards and Browser Mod targets.

get_voices.name: Get voices
get_voices.description: Return the voice catalog exposed by TPG HomeAI.

get_wake_word_deployment.name: Get wake word deployment
get_wake_word_deployment.description: Return voice source readiness, missing mappings, speaker routes, and room deployment recommendations.

speak.name: Speak
speak.description: Ask a TPG HomeAI assistant to speak using its configured voice.

test_command.name: Test command
test_command.description: Send a natural-language command to the TPG HomeAI server and return the result.

assistant_id.name: Assistant
assistant_id.description: Assistant id to use (defaults to the integration option).

user_id.name: User
user_id.description: User id to attribute the command to (defaults to the integration option).

conversation_id.name: Conversation ID
conversation_id.description: Optional conversation id to continue a session.
